description_long: This kiosk features a rectangular base with a checkered black and white floor pattern and a corrugated metal roof that is slightly rusted, providing shelter. The structure is supported by four slender vertical poles at each corner, and the roof extends beyond the base, creating a small overhang. One side of the kiosk is dominated by a large, flat panel with a red and white abstract design, likely serving as a sign or display board. The base appears to be elevated, with a series of circular cutouts or wheels along the bottom edge, giving it a mobile or modular appearance. The overall construction suggests a utilitarian, semi-permanent street-side kiosk suitable for urban environments.
description: A rectangular kiosk with a corrugated metal roof, checkered floor, and a large red and white sign panel on one side. Supported by four poles, it has a utilitarian, street-side design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large red and white sign panel, corrugated roof, and checkered floor pattern.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the kiosk, the overhanging roof, and the edge of the sign panel.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the open back, supporting poles, and the circular cutouts or wheels along the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the structure's length, roof overhang, and the back of the sign panel.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign panel on the front side, abstract red and white design, no visible text
attribute_roof_design: sloped corrugated metal roof with visible rust and overhangs on all sides
attribute_architectural_style: utilitarian with industrial and minimalist influences
